description: An employee needs to update their bank account information for direct deposit.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and authenticate their identity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the employee's identity.

nodes.task_description: Guide the employee to the self-service portal to update their direct deposit details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides instructions for the employee to make the change themselves.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the change may take 1-2 pay cycles to take effect and they might receive a paper check in the interim.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly sets expectations about the timing of the change.
